description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the elixir:1.7 Docker image and a postgres:latest service, and defines a DB_URL variable set to postgres://postgres:postgres@postgres/mana. Add a single job named build that runs in the default test stage. The build job executes the following shell commands in order: echo $DB_URL, mix local.hex --force, mix local.rebar --force, mix deps.get, mix deps.compile, mix compile --warnings-as-errors, mix test, and mix format --check-formatted. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are configured.
